name: tpl-restaurant-closing
description: Restaurant Ops Manager (餐廳營運主管) — pull POS sales and cash drawer tally, AI-reconcile cash vs system, alert on variance, submit daily report to HQ, generate next-day prep tasks. Replace POS and HQ-report externalUrl with your system endpoints (e.g. Toast, Square, Oracle MICROS).

steps.notifyMsg: Cash variance alert at {{location_name}} ({{restaurant_id}}) for {{reporting_date}}. Expected: {{steps.reconcile-cash.output.system_cash_expected}}, Counted: {{steps.reconcile-cash.output.physical_cash_counted}}, Variance: {{steps.reconcile-cash.output.variance_amount}} ({{steps.reconcile-cash.output.variance_pct}}% — threshold: {{variance_threshold_pct}}%). Breakdown: {{steps.reconcile-cash.output.discrepancy_breakdown}}. Recommended action: {{steps.reconcile-cash.output.recommended_action}}. Manager sign-off required before HQ report submission.
